metadata.notes: Iteration 2: testing leaner refactored SKILL.md (92 lines, reference content moved to references/collectionview-api.md). Added 2 new assertions to eval 1 based on iteration-1 grader feedback.

expectations.text: CollectionView uses a 2-column GridItemsLayout (Span=2 or Columns=2)
expectations.evidence: <GridItemsLayout Orientation="Vertical" Span="2" VerticalItemSpacing="12" HorizontalItemSpacing="12" />

expectations.text: DataTemplate includes an Image element bound to a photo or image source property
expectations.evidence: <Image Source="{Binding PhotoUrl}" Aspect="AspectFill" HeightRequest="120" HorizontalOptions="Fill" />

expectations.text: DataTemplate includes a Label bound to recipe Name and a Label bound to prep time
expectations.evidence: <Label Text="{Binding Name}" FontAttributes="Bold" ... /> and <Label Text="{Binding PrepTime}" FontSize="12" ... />

expectations.text: CollectionView has SelectionMode set to Single
expectations.evidence: <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding Recipes}" SelectionMode="Single" SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedRecipe, Mode=TwoWay}" ...>

expectations.text: ViewModel has a SelectedRecipe or SelectedItem property with property change notification
expectations.evidence: [ObservableProperty] private Recipe? _selectedRecipe; (CommunityToolkit.Mvvm source-generates INotifyPropertyChanged for SelectedRecipe)

expectations.text: x:DataType compiled bindings are used on the page and/or DataTemplate
expectations.evidence: x:DataType="viewmodels:RecipesViewModel" on ContentPage and x:DataType="models:Recipe" on DataTemplate

expectations.text: ViewModel uses ObservableCollection<Recipe> for the items source
expectations.evidence: [ObservableProperty] private ObservableCollection<Recipe> _recipes = [];

expectations.text: SelectedItem is bound TwoWay (or uses SelectionChanged event) to the SelectedRecipe property
expectations.evidence: SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedRecipe, Mode=TwoWay}"

expectations.text: VisualState Named 'Selected' is defined on the DataTemplate root to highlight selected items
expectations.evidence: <VisualState Name="Selected"><VisualState.Setters><Setter Property="BackgroundColor" .../></VisualState.Setters></VisualState> defined on the DataTemplate root Grid

expectations.text: CollectionView uses a 2-column GridItemsLayout (Span=2 or Columns=2)
expectations.evidence: <GridItemsLayout HorizontalItemSpacing="10" Orientation="Vertical" Span="2" VerticalItemSpacing="10" />

expectations.text: DataTemplate includes an Image element bound to a photo or image source property
expectations.evidence: <Image Grid.Row="0" Aspect="AspectFill" Source="{Binding PhotoUrl}">

expectations.text: DataTemplate includes a Label bound to recipe Name and a Label bound to prep time
expectations.evidence: <Label Text="{Binding Name}" ...> and <Label Text="{Binding PrepTimeDisplay}" ...>

expectations.text: CollectionView has SelectionMode set to Single
expectations.evidence: <CollectionView ... SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedRecipe, Mode=TwoWay}" SelectionMode="Single">

expectations.text: ViewModel has a SelectedRecipe or SelectedItem property with property change notification
expectations.evidence: public Recipe? SelectedRecipe { get => _selectedRecipe; set { ... OnPropertyChanged(); } } with INotifyPropertyChanged implemented

expectations.text: x:DataType compiled bindings are used on the page and/or DataTemplate
expectations.evidence: x:DataType="vm:RecipesViewModel" on ContentPage and x:DataType="models:Recipe" on DataTemplate

expectations.text: ViewModel uses ObservableCollection<Recipe> for the items source
expectations.evidence: public ObservableCollection<Recipe> Recipes { get; } = new();

expectations.text: SelectedItem is bound TwoWay (or uses SelectionChanged event) to the SelectedRecipe property
expectations.evidence: SelectedItem="{Binding SelectedRecipe, Mode=TwoWay}"

expectations.text: VisualState Named 'Selected' is defined on the DataTemplate root to highlight selected items
expectations.evidence: No VisualState defined. Selection highlighting uses a DataTrigger on Border element instead — functional but not the MAUI-idiomatic VisualStateManager pattern.

notes: DataTrigger used for selection highlighting instead of VisualStateManager — works but is not the recommended pattern for CollectionView selection feedback.

expectations.text: CollectionView has IsGrouped='True'
expectations.evidence: <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding GroupedProducts}" IsGrouped="True">

expectations.text: GroupHeaderTemplate shows category name and item count
expectations.evidence: <Label Text="{Binding CategoryName}" /> and <Label Text="{Binding ItemCount, StringFormat='{0} items'}" />

expectations.text: Price is formatted as currency (StringFormat with C, or similar currency formatting)
expectations.evidence: <Label Text="{Binding Price, StringFormat='{0:C}'}" />

expectations.text: An 'Add to Cart' button has a Command binding
expectations.evidence: <Button Text="Add to Cart" Command="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type viewmodels:CatalogViewModel}}, Path=AddToCartCommand}" CommandParameter="{Binding}" />

expectations.text: Pull-to-refresh is implemented via RefreshView or IsBusy pattern
expectations.evidence: <RefreshView IsRefreshing="{Binding IsRefreshing}" Command="{Binding RefreshCommand}">

expectations.text: CollectionView has an EmptyView defined for the no-results state
expectations.evidence: <CollectionView.EmptyView><ContentView><VerticalStackLayout><Label Text="No products found" /></VerticalStackLayout></ContentView></CollectionView.EmptyView>

expectations.text: ViewModel uses a grouped collection structure (ObservableCollection of group objects)
expectations.evidence: ObservableCollection<ProductGroup> GroupedProducts where ProductGroup : List<Product>

expectations.text: CollectionView has IsGrouped='True'
expectations.evidence: <CollectionView ItemsSource="{Binding ProductGroups}" IsGrouped="True" SelectionMode="None">

expectations.text: GroupHeaderTemplate shows category name and item count
expectations.evidence: <Label Text="{Binding CategoryName}" /> and <Label Text="{Binding ItemCount, StringFormat='{0} item(s)'}" />

expectations.text: Price is formatted as currency (StringFormat with C, or similar currency formatting)
expectations.evidence: <Label Text="{Binding Price, StringFormat='{0:C}'}" />

expectations.text: An 'Add to Cart' button has a Command binding
expectations.evidence: <Button Command="{Binding Source={RelativeSource AncestorType={x:Type vm:CatalogViewModel}}, Path=AddToCartCommand}" CommandParameter="{Binding .}" />

expectations.text: Pull-to-refresh is implemented via RefreshView or IsBusy pattern
expectations.evidence: <RefreshView Command="{Binding RefreshCommand}" IsRefreshing="{Binding IsRefreshing, Mode=TwoWay}">

expectations.text: CollectionView has an EmptyView defined for the no-results state
expectations.evidence: <CollectionView.EmptyView><VerticalStackLayout><Label Text="No products found" /></VerticalStackLayout></CollectionView.EmptyView>

expectations.text: ViewModel uses a grouped collection structure (ObservableCollection of group objects)
expectations.evidence: ObservableCollection<ProductGroup> where ProductGroup : ObservableCollection<Product>

expectations.text: CollectionView displays messages from an ObservableCollection
expectations.evidence: ObservableCollection<Message> Messages in ViewModel, bound via ItemsSource="{Binding Messages}"

expectations.text: Message alignment differs by sender — right-aligned for current user, left-aligned for others
expectations.evidence: Message.HorizontalAlignment computed property returns LayoutOptions.End (IsFromMe) or Start; bound in XAML to HorizontalOptions

expectations.text: Code calls CollectionView.ScrollTo() to scroll to the last message when new messages arrive
expectations.evidence: MessagesCollectionView.ScrollTo(item: message, position: ScrollToPosition.End, animate: true);

expectations.text: A CollectionChanged or property-change handler triggers the scroll behavior
expectations.evidence: Messages.CollectionChanged += OnMessagesCollectionChanged; plus MessageAdded event — both trigger ScrollTo

expectations.text: Message model has properties for content/text, a sender or IsFromMe flag, and optionally timestamp
expectations.evidence: Text, SenderName, IsFromMe, Timestamp all present on Message.cs

expectations.text: CollectionView displays messages from an ObservableCollection
expectations.evidence: ObservableCollection<Message> Messages in ViewModel, ItemsSource="{Binding Messages}"

expectations.text: Message alignment differs by sender — right-aligned for current user, left-aligned for others
expectations.evidence: Two Grid layouts with IsVisible toggled by IsFromMe — right-aligned for sender, left for others

expectations.text: Code calls CollectionView.ScrollTo() to scroll to the last message when new messages arrive
expectations.evidence: MessagesCollectionView.ScrollTo(item: lastMessage, position: ScrollToPosition.End, animate: true);

expectations.text: A CollectionChanged or property-change handler triggers the scroll behavior
expectations.evidence: MessageAdded event triggers scroll in code-behind via OnMessageAdded handler

expectations.text: Message model has properties for content/text, a sender or IsFromMe flag, and optionally timestamp
expectations.evidence: Text, IsFromMe, SenderName, Timestamp all present on Message.cs

notes: Used deprecated Frame instead of Border/RoundRectangle for message bubbles
Dual-template visibility toggle is heavier than DataTemplateSelector approach
